value.found_quote: Tracing is built into the Agents SDK and is enabled by default in the normal server-side SDK path. Every run can emit a structured record of model calls, tool calls, handoffs, guardrails, and custom spans, which you can inspect in the Traces dashboard.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes OpenAI's built-in tracing feature in the Agents SDK, confirming it emits a structured record of model calls, tool calls, handoffs, guardrails, and custom spans for each run, and that these are viewable in a Traces dashboard (https://platform.openai.com/traces). This directly matches the claim's description. The feature is described as enabled by default with no deprecation or preview language.
